text: 48. Subcontractor agrees to provide one or more person(s) to participate in a composite cleanup crew for the entire duration of this scope of work. Personnel for the composite cleanup crew, by this subcontractor, will be required for only one day of the week, for every week that this subcontractor is performing work on the project. If manpower is not allocated by this subcontractor to the composite cleanup crew, the general contractor will supplement that day's cleanup at this subcontractor's expense.
